title: Oil rises as IEA flags greater volatility ahead, OPEC cuts demand forecast
summary: OPEC cut its demand growth estimates for 2026 to about 1.2 million barrels per day.

title: Big Oil Reconsiders Previously Unattractive Destinations
summary: The Middle Eastern crisis has prompted a reprioritization among international oil companies. Previously unattractive drilling destinations are suddenly looking quite attractive—even Alaska. title: The gold chart looks poised for a bounce. How to play it for less
summary: If you've been watching the SPDR Gold Shares (GLD), you know the yellow metal has been consolidating and appears to be bouncing off its 150-day moving average (support).

title: Hormuz closure stalls construction projects as material costs soar
summary: Building schemes around the world are being held up by shortages of products derived from oil
